subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath made the House the point of circling for the world and exalted its mention among the nations, and peace and blessings rest upon His Messengers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمدا لمن جعل البیت مطاف العالم و رفع ذکره من الامم و الصلوة و السلام علی رسله
